title: Badsha the King
subTitle: Badsha, a young man, saves Titli, a wealthy heiress, on multiple occasions. However, things become complicated when the duo falls in love.

title: Proloy
subTitle: In a rural town plagued by crimes against women and children, a teacher decides to organise an activist group to stand up against the injustice.

title: Shiv Shakti
subTitle: Tarakasura believes that Parvati will respond to the gods' pleas. He then decides to take advantage of the time during incarnation to kill her.

title: Tumi Sudhu Amar
subTitle: Piku and Priya secure a big deal with Singhray Industries in London. However, the company owner's infatuation with Priya threatens their relationship.

title: Behula Lakhinder
subTitle: An arrogant man who is against theism refuses to acknowledge a Goddess in her mortal avatar. Later, she teaches him a lesson to accept her divinity.

title: Surya
subTitle: Ashok, a businessman, provides shelter to Mahim Halden who kills and takes over his property. Soon, Ashok's son, Surya, sets out to avenge his father's death.

title: Josh
subTitle: Indra, a care-free college student, tries to save his best friend's sister, Anuradha, from a dangerous family dispute, but his efforts lead to unexpected and worsening complications.

title: Champion
subTitle: Jones, a talented and disciplined footballer, is judged by his peers for his financial status. However, when he finds out about his past, he faces a dilemma.

title: Minister Phatakesto
subTitle: Fatakeshto, an MLA turned home minister, vows to rescue the government from a massive financial loss while political thugs create several hurdles for him.

title: Prem Amar
subTitle: A young man falls in love with his new neighbour. However, his life takes a turn for the worse when he learns that she is betrothed to another man.

title: Prem Amar
subTitle: A young man falls in love with his new neighbour. However, his life takes a turn for the worse when he learns that she is betrothed to another man.

title: Ekannoborti
subTitle: On the occasion of Durga Puja, the Banerjee family reunites to celebrate together. However, as the women spend time together, their challenges begin to surface.

title: Shiv Shakti
subTitle: Diti requests that Tarkasura get rid of Parvati instead of randomly targeting baby girls. The gods are delighted by the news of Shakti's rebirth as Parvati.

title: Meghe Dhaka Tara
subTitle: Neeta is the beautiful daughter of a middle-class refugee from East Pakistan. She sacrifices everything for her family while they exploit her goodness and take advantage of her.

title: Saptami
subTitle: Soumya, a young man, falls in love with and marries Saptami, a beautiful woman. He leaves her with a friend to complete his higher studies but returns only to find shocking truths.

title: Sindurer Adhikar
subTitle: Misunderstandings cause Prijay and Susmita's marriage to fall apart and she moves to her brother Prakash's house. Prijay's illness, however, makes her rethink her decision.

title: Khokababu
subTitle: Abir Roy falls in love with his employer's younger sister. His employer, however, happens to be a dangerous gangster and is overprotective of his sister.

title: Subho Drishti
subTitle: Bringing the best in cinema.

title: Premer Kahini
subTitle: Akash falls in love with Barsha but loses contact with her due to unforeseeable circumstances. While attending a marriage ceremony, he is shocked to realise that the bride is none other than Barsha.

title: Bidroho
subTitle: Uttam's ailing mother dies after not getting proper treatment when the landlord refuses to help them. Later, he decides to exact revenge against the injustice done to him.

title: Bidroho
subTitle: Uttam's ailing mother dies after not getting proper treatment when the landlord refuses to help them. Later, he decides to exact revenge against the injustice done to him.

title: Crisscross
subTitle: The lives of five women, each with a different life story, get intertwined after a series of disastrous events leads to an introspection.

title: Shiv Shakti
subTitle: After reuniting with Parvati, Lord Vishnu explains to her family the reason for her rebirth. Diti seeks Tarakasura's help to end Parvati's life.

title: Hero No. 1
subTitle: A young man falls for a woman after she flees from her abusive husband. Later, as they work together to save orphans, their growing bond is tested by her past.

title: Sansar Sangram
subTitle: The death of his father leaves Anand's life in sudden sorrow and upheaval. Soon, he navigates the challenges of supporting his family on his own two shoulders.

title: Madhur Milan
subTitle: Sunita, who hails from a rich family, is mesmerised by Gopal's music. Their interactions over time compel them to believe they are lovers from a previous life.

title: Amader Sansar
subTitle: Soumen goes against his mother's will and decides to tie the knot with his teacher's daughter in order to make him happy.

title: Mon Mane Na
subTitle: On their way to Siliguri, India, Rahul and Ria bump into each other. While Rahul plans to sell a stolen necklace, Ria is excited to meet her boyfriend.

title: Awara
subTitle: Surya falls in love with a girl and follows her to Kolkata, where she stays with her rowdy elder brother. Later, he decides to rescue her when he discovers that a gangster wants to marry her forcibly.

title: Jamai Raja
subTitle: Realising that marriage is her only path to inheriting her father's fortune, a woman gets married to a poor man who is in desperate need of money.
